task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'field_observations' layer is highlighted or selected in the layer panel, or the UI indicates it is the active layer for adding features.

task_completion.description: Create a point feature for Quito with the specified attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A point is placed on the map near Quito, Ecuador (northwestern South America). The feature creation form shows 'Hub_Quito' and 'Region: Americas' entered into the available text fields.

task_completion.description: Create a point feature for Nairobi with the specified attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A point is placed on the map near Nairobi, Kenya (eastern Africa). The feature creation form shows 'Hub_Nairobi' and 'Region: Africa' entered into the available text fields.

task_completion.description: Create a point feature for Singapore with the specified attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A point is placed on the map near Singapore (Southeast Asia). The feature creation form shows 'Hub_Singapore' and 'Region: Asia' entered into the available text fields.

task_completion.description: Save the new features to the layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the checkmark button to save each feature, or toggles off edit mode and confirms saving changes to the 'field_observations' layer.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField map interface and feature forms to add points.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField map canvas, crosshairs, and feature attribute forms, rather than a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the map to the correct geographic regions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the map panned and zoomed to South America, Africa, and Southeast Asia when placing the respective points.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are approximately: Quito (lat: -0.23, lon: -78.52), Nairobi (lat: -1.29, lon: 36.82), Singapore (lat: 1.35, lon: 103.82). Note: The 'field_observations' layer schema does not actually contain 'Name' and 'Notes' fields. The agent should be awarded points if it enters the requested text ('Hub_Quito', 'Region: Americas', etc.) into any available text fields in the feature creation form.
